skipSet.title: Skip Set?
skipSet.message: Are you sure you want to skip this set?

workoutSession.notFoundDescription: Unable to load entrenamiento session. Please try again.
workoutSession.ovulationInsight: During ovulation, you may experience increased strength and performance.
workoutSession.menstrualInsight: During menstruation, you may need to reduce intensity and focus on recovery.
workoutSession.lowFuelingMessage: You've consumed only {{carbs}}g of carbs in the last {{hours}} hours. Glycogen stores might be low. For future sessions, aim for more carbs pre-entrenamiento. A quick snack now might still help Tu performance.
workoutSession.fullyFueledMessage: You've consumed {{carbs}}g of carbs in the last {{hours}} hours. You are fully fueled and ready to crush it!
